title: Tympole Pack [Cobblemon]
body:
# Tympole, Palpitoad, and Seismitoad!
For all 6 fans of this 'Mon and its evolutionary line, this is a datapack that [will] add those three Cobblemon to your world. Requires Cobblemon as a dependency.
As is usual with Cobblemon datapacks, this must be added to both your resourcepacks folder and your world's (or server's) datapacks folder to work properly. 

Tympole spawns in swamps, rivers, dripstone caves, and lush caves. 

## This Datapack is a work in progress!
Right now, this datapack only adds Tympole and Palpitoad. A future update will include Seismitoad, but for now evolving Palpitoad will turn it into a substitute :(

## Permissions
You can use this on your servers however you'd like, send it to your friends, etc. Just do not reupload this file anywhere else. No, I do not upload to CurseForge.
